executives.name: Tracey Meintjes
executives.background: Mr. Meintjes has over 30 years of experience in mining project development. He is currently a consultant and was previously with Teck Resources.

board_of_directors.background: Mr. Meintjes has over 30 years of experience in mining project development. He is currently a consultant and was previously with Teck Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Larry Segerstrom
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Segerstrom is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was formerly COO of Paramount Gold and Silver Corp. and has held senior positions with Freeport-McMoRan.
